description: Golden expectations for tender_solar.txt × company_solar.json. Keywords are matched against extracted criteria text (case-insensitive).

expected_criteria.why: Tender needs 300L avg turnover; company has 420L
Company completed 1.2 MW plant (>= 1 MW requirement)
No audited balance sheets in the (empty) document vault
Company holds Bihar Electrical Contractor License
Self-declaration affidavit not in vault — must be produced

hallucination_traps.description: Things NOT in the tender. If the auditor invents these, it's hallucinating.

expected_match.why: Same state, same sector, turnover comfortably clears, direct experience
